description: Accessibility and performance fixes across safe-to-edit apps. Fix missing ARIA labels, keyboard navigation gaps, and add React.memo/useMemo/useCallback where components re-render unnecessarily. Focus on quantmeet ControlBar (already good ARIA), quantcalendar CalendarGrid (missing aria-label on view container), and quantchat MessageInput (likely missing label). Add aria-live regions for dynamic content like typing indicators.
steps: Review apps/quantcalendar/src/components/CalendarGrid.tsx - add role='main' and aria-label='Calendar view' to the outer container. Ensure each view type (MonthView, WeekView, etc.) has appropriate aria-labels on their grid containers.
Review apps/quantcalendar/src/components/EventCard.tsx - ensure event cards have role='button' or are wrapped in buttons for keyboard accessibility, and have aria-label with the event title and time.

Review apps/quantchat/src/components/MessageInput.tsx - ensure the text input has aria-label='Type a message', the send button has aria-label='Send message'. Add aria-live='polite' to the typing indicator area so screen readers announce when someone is typing.
Review apps/quantchat/src/components/ChatBubble.tsx - ensure messages have appropriate roles (role='listitem' if in a list) and aria-labels indicating sender and timestamp.
Add React.memo() wrapper to apps/quantmeet/src/components/VideoTile.tsx to prevent unnecessary re-renders when parent ParticipantGrid updates for unrelated participants.
Add React.memo() wrapper to apps/quantcalendar/src/components/EventCard.tsx to prevent re-renders when other events on the calendar change.
Run pnpm typecheck and pnpm lint after all changes to confirm no regressions.
acceptance_criteria: CalendarGrid has aria-label on its container
MessageInput has aria-label on the input field
VideoTile and EventCard are wrapped with React.memo
findings: All changes passed typecheck and lint. Message type does not have senderName so used 'you'/'other' for aria-label. Kept changes minimal - only a11y attributes and React.memo wrappers added.
